diagrams.title: For Loop Flowchart
diagrams.description: Shows the execution flow of a for loop with initialization, condition check, body execution, and increment
diagrams.purpose: Understanding for loop execution sequence and control flow

diagrams.title: While Loop vs Do-While Loop
diagrams.description: Comparison showing condition check position in while (before body) vs do-while (after body)
elements: Zero vs One execution guarantee visualization
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the key difference between while and do-while loops

diagrams.title: Nested Loop Iteration Order
diagrams.description: Visual representation of how nested loops execute - outer loop changes slower than inner loop
diagrams.purpose: Understanding iteration order in nested loops for pattern printing and matrix operations

diagrams.title: Break vs Continue Statement Flow
diagrams.description: Comparison showing how break exits the loop completely while continue skips only current iteration
elements: Break: Enter Loop -> Condition -> Body -> Break -> Exit Loop
Continue: Enter Loop -> Condition -> Body -> Continue -> Next Iteration
Visual comparison of control flow paths
diagrams.purpose: Differentiating between break and continue statements in loop control
